title: RGCS environment record
description: Environmental state during one run. Temperature enters the correction ledger (delta_T, RGCS-M.45); ambient acoustics and EMI are artifact channels.

fixture_id.description: Mount/fixture identity; fixture resonances are a registered artifact source.

specimen_temperature_c.description: If measured separately (coil/electrode heating check; stop condition > 5-10 C rise).

ambient_acoustic_dba.description: Background SPL at specimen position before drive.

mains_frequency_hz.description: Nominal mains (50/60 Hz) - hum/harmonic artifact bookkeeping.

instrument_phase_drift_deg.description: Measured instrument phase-drift budget for the session (KOS-13 gate; required before H-13 claims).
